creator: tobez@plab.ku.dk
text:
While trying to assign quota limits to a value greater than
4Gbytes (4194304 kbytes) edquota does not report any problems and
finishes successfully; however, actually assigned limits get wrapped
modulo 4Gbytes.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to assign, say, hard limit to 5242880, save & exit.  Run
edquota again for the same user.  The assigned quota will be 1048576.
